title: Pharmacology
description: Principles of drug actions, receptor pathways, and medication administration.

lessons.title: Principles of Drug Actions
lessons.description: Slides 1–38: Patient verification, routes of administration, ADME, receptor pathways.

lessons.title: Calculating Drug Doses, Bronchodilators & Mucus-Controlling Therapy
lessons.description: Slides 39–88: Drug dose calculations, SABAs, LABAs, anticholinergics, peak flow monitoring, xanthines, and mucus-controlling drug therapy.

lessons.title: Corticosteroids, Anti-Infectives, Vasodilators & Critical Care Agents
lessons.description: Slides 89–152: Corticosteroids, nonsteroidal anti-asthma agents, anti-infective agents, cold and cough agents, pulmonary vasodilators, neuromuscular blocking agents, diuretics, and fluid resuscitation.

lessons.title: Pain Management, Vasopressors, Inotropes & Antiarrhythmic Agents
lessons.description: Slides 154–176: Pain management, analgesics, sedatives, benzodiazepines, vasopressors, inotropes, and antiarrhythmic agents.

lessons.title: Module Exam
lessons.description: Comprehensive 100-question exam covering all Pharmacology module content from Lessons 1–4.

resources.title: Quizlet Study Sets — RESC 2320
resources.description: Flashcards and practice sets for Respiratory Therapy coursework.

resources.title: Pharmacology Study Guide
resources.description: Interactive fill-in-the-blank study guide covering routes, receptors, bronchodilators, cardiac meds, and more.

resources.title: Pharmacology Study Worksheet
resources.description: Printable 10-page worksheet with diagrams and blanks — covers routes, ADME, receptors, dose calculations, and all major drug classes.

audio.title: Corticosteroids, Anti-Infectives, Vasodilators & Critical Care Agents (Slides 89–152)
Pain Management, Vasopressors, Inotropes & Antiarrhythmic Agents (Slides 154–176)
